description: Golden dataset for memory search relevance evaluation. 35 queries across 6 categories covering exact match, semantic similarity, German language, graph-connected, multi-topic, and negation/absence patterns. Each query includes expected top results that should appear in the search output when the memory store is populated with the project's knowledge base.

queries.query: What programming language does the project use?
expectedTopResults: TypeScript is the main language for all core packages
Bun is the runtime used instead of Node.js
SQLite via bun:sqlite is the database engine
Three-database split: memory.db, operational.db, audit.db
RTX 5080 with 16GB VRAM
GPU worker runs on Windows PC
Qwen3-TTS 1.7B is the primary TTS model
Kitten TTS is the CPU fallback for text-to-speech

queries.query: What is the encryption algorithm for secrets?
expectedTopResults: AES-256-GCM encryption with scrypt key derivation
Secrets are encrypted at rest in secrets.db
pnpm workspaces is the package manager

queries.query: How does the assistant remember things between conversations?
expectedTopResults: Memory engine auto-extracts facts from conversations
MEMORY.md is injected into Claude Code sessions with relevant memories
Dreaming phases consolidate short-term memories into long-term

queries.query: How are API costs kept under control?
expectedTopResults: Energy budget limits tokens per hour with category allocation
Sub-agent routing uses cheaper models for simple tasks
Token usage is tracked per session with cost calculation

queries.query: What happens when the main server goes down?
expectedTopResults: Circuit breakers prevent cascading failures
Event bus persists events to SQLite for crash recovery
Graceful degradation: TTS falls back from GPU to CPU to system to text-only

queries.query: How does the assistant learn new things on its own?
expectedTopResults: Self-learning discovery engine crawls Reddit, HN, GitHub, and RSS
Relevance filter scores content against user interests
Code changes from self-learning always require user approval
Action classification: safe, needs_approval, dangerous
All code changes require user approval before merging
Audit trail logs every action with timestamp and classification
TypeScript ist die Hauptsprache fuer alle Kernpakete
TypeScript is the main language for all core packages
AES-256-GCM Verschluesselung mit scrypt Schluesselableitung
Secrets are encrypted at rest in secrets.db
Ubuntu Server, Windows PC mit RTX 5080, MacBook, iPhone
All devices connected via Tailscale mesh VPN
Qwen3-TTS fuer Sprachausgabe, faster-whisper fuer Spracherkennung
Voice pipeline: STT -> Claude -> TTS with sentence-level chunking
Dreaming has three phases: housekeeping, REM, and NREM
Housekeeping removes duplicates, REM discovers associations, NREM abstracts schemas
grammY framework fuer den Telegram Bot
Telegram is the primary messaging channel
All devices connected via Tailscale mesh VPN
GPU worker accessible via Tailscale network
Desktop and iOS clients connect to Core over Tailscale
RTX 5080 with 16GB VRAM on Windows PC
Qwen3-TTS runs on the GPU worker
faster-whisper STT runs on the GPU
Claude Code CLI is the execution engine managed as subprocess
IClaudeProcess abstraction enables testing with FakeClaudeProcess
Sessions use --allowedTools for tool restriction by session type
memory.db stores memories, embeddings, and knowledge graph tables
FTS5 virtual table for BM25 keyword search
sqlite-vec for vector similarity search
PEAR cycle: Perceive, Evaluate, Act, Reflect
Event bus feeds events to the cognitive loop
Energy budget controls token allocation per category

queries.query: voice and GPU setup for TTS
expectedTopResults: Qwen3-TTS 1.7B on RTX 5080 via GPU worker
Sentence-level TTS chunking with Intl.Segmenter
Opus codec for audio transport over WebSocket
AES-256-GCM encrypted secrets with scrypt
Action classification: safe, needs_approval, dangerous
API keys isolated per subprocess environment
Hybrid search: BM25 + vector + graph with RRF fusion
ComplEx embeddings for knowledge graph link prediction
Leiden community detection during NREM dreaming
grammY framework with long polling mode
User allowlist with Telegram user IDs
DND schedule for notification suppression
Tauri 2.0 for desktop with Svelte frontend
SwiftUI for iOS with dual networking: Tailscale and Cloudflare Tunnel
WebSocket JSON-RPC 2.0 for client-Core communication
Git worktree for isolated feature branches
Auto-lint and test gate before merge
Code changes always require user approval
Claude (Anthropic) is the only LLM provider, not OpenAI
Local embeddings use multilingual-e5-small, not OpenAI embeddings

queries.query: Is Node.js used as the runtime?
expectedTopResults: Bun is the runtime, not Node.js
bun:sqlite is used instead of better-sqlite3

queries.query: Does the project use Electron for the desktop app?
expectedTopResults: Tauri 2.0 is used instead of Electron
Tauri binary is ~5MB vs ~150MB for Electron
Secrets are never stored in plaintext
AES-256-GCM encryption for all secrets at rest

queries.query: Can the assistant modify code without approval?
expectedTopResults: Code changes from self-learning always require user approval
Implementation is never auto-classified as safe
SQLite is the database, not PostgreSQL
Three SQLite databases: memory.db, operational.db, audit.db

queries.query: Does the project use cron for scheduling?
expectedTopResults: Built-in scheduler replaces cron
Tasks feed into the Event Bus and compete with other priorities
